oneOf.description: Hide when adjacent to same block type.
Hide when adjacent to same block permutation (block state).
Hide when adjacent to any block in the same culling layer. Culling layers are defined in the block's geometry definition.

cull_against_full_and_opaque.description: If set to false, then culling against full and opaque blocks will not be considered.

direction.title: Facing
direction.description: Specifies the direction of the neighbor block to check for culling. This direction rotates with a block's Transform component.

rule_geometry_part.title: Rule Geometry Part
rule_geometry_part.description: Specifies the bone, cube, and face that the block will be culled. The cube and face fields are optional to allow culling a specific face. Omitting these fields will cull the whole bone.

bone.description: The name of the bone to cull. This is the only required field, and it will cull the entire bone if cube and face are not specified.
